title: OP_GET request body
description: Single-row feature read. table is a registered table name; key is a string for single-key tables or a homogeneous [string|number|boolean] array for composite-key tables. Per ADR-003, key MAY be the empty string `""` to retrieve the global state for a global table (declared with key=[] in the register payload). features (optional) limits the response to a subset.

oneOf.description: Single-key table entity_id, OR `""` (empty string) for global-table state per ADR-003.

features.description: Optional subset of features to return; omit for all features.
